---
title: "Upright and inverted unfamiliar face-matching tasks — everything correlates everywhere all at once"
authors: "Tree, J. J., Kramer, R. S. S., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2025
date: 2025-01-01
pub-journal: "Memory & Cognition"
doi: "10.3758/s13421-025-01725-w"
pdf: "assets/papers/2025/treekramerjones2025b.pdf"
categories: [face-perception]
---
